name: God Loves Me
subtitle: Who is God, and does He know me?
description: Your child's first journey through Scripture — discovering that God made them, loves them, and hears them.
mainTruth: God made me, God loves me, and God hears me when I pray.
outcomes: Knows God created the world and them personally
Can say 'God loves me' with confidence
Has prayed to God in their own words at least once
Has one memory verse they can repeat
completionMessage: You have planted five stories in your heart. God made you, God loves you, and now you know how to talk to Him. Lumi grew because you did.
parentNote: After this journey, your child has the theological foundation they need: a Creator God who loves them personally and is accessible through prayer. Everything else builds on this.
